name: Noodles Romanoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions until barely tender.
2. Drain the noodles.
3. Mix together cream cheese, sour cream, and butter in a bowl.
4. Stir the mixture into the noodles.
5. Add scallions, garlic, and pepper to the noodle mixture.
6. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish.
7. Combine bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
8. Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture over the top of the noodle mixture.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
